title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers presents five production deployment patterns for AI agents built with TypeScript: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, separated auth layers using API Gateway and Cognito with IAM bridges, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost budgets and model routing, and observability via metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. The patterns are demonstrated using Strands Agents SDK and AWS services.
